official_sources.authority_note: Existing generated official answer owns the Protocol 775 Configuration clientbound keep_alive framed payload and input id.
Existing generated official answer owns the Protocol 775 Configuration serverbound keep_alive framed response payload for the same input id.

runtime_path: official Configuration clientbound keep_alive network frame
official Configuration serverbound keep_alive network frame
question.network_framing: With compression threshold disabled, each Conn network packet is VarInt(length of official framed payload) followed by the official framed payload.
question.current_harness_access: The reset-proof oracle test loads and validates the official inbound/outbound answer artifacts, then executes a crate-local probe through Server::handle_next_reader_packet_for_oracle, the same factored keep_alive branch used by Server::spawn_reader.

stop_boundary: This runtime probe targets only the factored Server::spawn_reader keep_alive branch for one official Protocol 775 Configuration keep_alive frame; it must not claim Configuration completion, Play entry, registry hydration, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
